t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID -- platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Mapped from Dim_Customer.RealCID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added lineage sentence not in upstream

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Group Customer ID -- cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Original customer ID from the source provider. Together with OriginalProviderID, enables tracing of migrated accounts. Default=0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Original customer ID from the source provider. Together with OriginalProviderID, enables tracing of migrated accounts. Default=0.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: eToro Club loyalty tier name. Values: Bronze (45.97M), Silver (287K), Gold (259K), Platinum (129K), Platinum Plus (92K), Diamond (11K). Dim-lookup from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Completely rewritten; dropped Internal/N/A values, dropped BackOffice reporting usage, added distribution counts not from upstream

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer email address. Unique (case-insensitive via LowerEmail computed column). Email changes trigger Customer.LastChanges update via trigger.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer email address. Dynamically masked with default().
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped uniqueness constraint, LowerEmail computed column, trigger behavior; replaced with DDL masking info

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer date of birth. Used in LinkedAccountHash1 for duplicate detection and in KYC age verification.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer date of birth. Used in KYC age verification.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Gender: M, F, or U (Unknown). CHECK constraint CCST_GENDER enforces these three values only.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Gender: M, F, or U (Unknown). CHECK constraint enforces these three values only.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Top-level marketing channel category. Derived from AffWizz MarketingExpense.MarketingExpenseName with overrides: 'Introducing Agents' -> 'Affiliate', AffiliateID IN (56662,56663) -> 'Direct'. (Tier 2 in Dim_Channel)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Top-level marketing channel category. Dim-lookup via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID -> Dim_Channel.Channel. ISNULL default 'Direct' for customers without affiliate mapping. Common values: Direct, SEM, SEO, Affiliate, Friend Referral.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Completely rewritten; wrong tier (claimed T1 but Dim_Channel marks as T2); dropped AffWizz derivation and CASE expression origin

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Granular sub-channel name within the parent Channel. Human-readable label for SubChannelID. Derived via parallel CASE expression alongside SubChannelID. (Tier 2 in Dim_Channel)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Granular sub-channel name within the parent Channel. Dim-lookup via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID -> Dim_Channel.SubChannel. ISNULL default 'Direct'.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Rewritten; wrong tier (claimed T1 but source is T2); dropped CASE-expression derivation

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Brand name displayed in BackOffice interfaces, reports, and internal systems. Multiple LabelIDs can share the same Name (e.g., 0, 1, 9 all = 'eToro').
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: White-label broker brand name. Dim-lookup from Dim_Label.Name via LabelID. Most customers show 'eToro' (LabelID 0/1).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Rewritten; dropped BackOffice usage context; dropped multi-LabelID sharing note (0, 1, 9 all = 'eToro')

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Version of the privacy policy the customer has accepted. FK to Dictionary.PrivacyPolicy.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Version of the privacy policy the customer has accepted. FK to Dictionary.PrivacyPolicy.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Secondary/override regulation for accounts subject to multiple jurisdictions. FK to Dictionary.Regulation.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Secondary/override regulation for accounts subject to multiple jurisdictions. FK to Dictionary.Regulation.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Electronic verification match result. Score or decision from automated identity verification vendors (Onfido, Au10tix). NULL if not yet processed.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Electronic verification match result. Score or decision from automated identity verification vendors (Onfido, Au10tix). NULL if not yet processed.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Regulatory entity governing this account. FK to Dictionary.Regulation. Top values: CySEC=7.39M, BVI=7.30M, FCA=1.17M. Changes trigger RegulationChangeDate update.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Regulatory entity governing this account. FK to Dictionary.Regulation. Top values: CySEC, BVI, FCA.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped specific value counts and trigger behavior

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Affiliate (partner) ID under which the customer was acquired (renamed from SerialID). FK to BackOffice.Affiliate. NULL for direct/organic registrations.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Affiliate (partner) ID under which the customer was acquired (renamed from AffiliateID in Dim_Customer). FK to BackOffice.Affiliate. NULL for direct/organic registrations.

issues.problem: Tagged Tier 1 (fiktivo_dbo.tblaff_Affiliates via Dim_Channel) but Dim_Channel marks both columns as Tier 2 — they are SP-computed via a massive CASE expression, not dictionary passthroughs. Should be Tier 2 — SP_CIDFirstDates via Dim_Channel.

Tagged Tier 2 (SP_CIDFirstDates via Dim_Country.Region) but Region is a dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_Country.Region which traces to Dictionary.MarketingRegion.Name. Per dim-lookup rules, should be Tier 1 — Dictionary.MarketingRegion.

Upstream says 'Unique (case-insensitive via LowerEmail computed column). Email changes trigger Customer.LastChanges update via trigger.' Wiki says only 'Customer email address. Dynamically masked with default().' Dropped uniqueness, computed column, and trigger semantics.

Upstream Dim_PlayerLevel.Name says 'Tier display name: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A. Used in BackOffice reporting JOINs and customer-facing UI.' Wiki completely rewrites with distribution counts and lineage, dropping Internal/N/A and BackOffice context.
Tagged Tier 2 but is a dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_State_and_Province.Name, which traces to Dictionary.RegionName.Name. Should be Tier 1 — Dictionary.RegionName.
Upstream includes 'Used in LinkedAccountHash1 for duplicate detection and in KYC age verification.' Wiki drops the LinkedAccountHash1 reference — a specific technical use case lost.

Upstream says 'Brand name displayed in BackOffice interfaces, reports, and internal systems. Multiple LabelIDs can share the same Name (e.g., 0, 1, 9 all = eToro).' Wiki completely rewrites, dropping the multi-ID sharing note.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag Channel and SubChannel as Tier 2 — Dim_Channel marks them T2 (SP-computed via CASE). (2) Re-tag Region as Tier 1 — Dictionary.MarketingRegion (dim-lookup passthrough through Dim_Country). (3) Re-tag State as Tier 1 — Dictionary.RegionName. (4) Restore Email upstream text: 'Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via LowerEmail computed column index). Email changes trigger Customer.LastChanges update via trigger.' (5) Restore Club upstream text from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name verbatim, including Internal/N/A. (6) Restore BirthDate upstream text including LinkedAccountHash1. (7) Restore LabelName upstream text including multi-LabelID sharing note.

table_level_stats_in_descriptions: Club distribution counts (45.97M Bronze, 287K Silver, etc.) appear in element description — likely from live query
